title: HoloArsenal
description: HoloArsenal is a resource pack that adds Hololive Weapons as a custom item models in the game by renaming a specific item on an anvil.
body:
# HoloArsenal

![HoloArsenal weapon preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8a78b130119c76a93707508ff6decdf3c1d5414.png)

**HoloArsenal** is a resource pack that changes default Minecraft weapon models to Hololive Members Weapons!!

as of version 1.1 Kronii's Weapon model is broken.So i decided to remove it.

**How to Use**: Simply rename your weapon (Sword, Trident, Shield, and Mace) in an Anvil with the Weapon Keywords and they'll change into a new weapon!

**!! THE ITEM NAMES ARE CASE SENSITIVE !!**
## Items name list
### Hololive Myth:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- **Burning Phoenix** (Takanashi Kiara's Sword & Shield /can be used in Shield)
  
- **Eye of Wisdom** (Amelia Watson's Magnifying Glass)
  
- **Rest in Peace** (Mori Calliope's Scythe)

- **Oceanic Terror** (Gawr Gura's Trident /can be used in Trident)
  
- **Violet Miasma** (Ninomae Ina'nis Book)
</details>

### Hololive Promise:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Chrono Surge Tick** (Ouro Kronii's Long Sword)

- **Chrono Surge Tock** (Ouro Kronii's Short Sword)

- **Winds of Civilization** (Nanashi Mumei's Dagger)

- **Nature's Grace** (Ceres Fauna's Golden Apple)

- **Chaos Stampede** (Hakos Baelz Dice)

- **Light and Dark** (IRys weapons)

</details>

### Hololive Advent:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Bookmark of Memories** (Shiori Novella's Pen Quill)

- **Shining Emotions** (Koseki Bijou's Crystal)

- **Resonant Strike** (Nerissa Ravencroft's Tuning Fork)

- **Azure Claw** (Fuwawa's Claws)

- **Fuchsia Claw** (Mococo's Claws)

</details>

### Hololive Justice:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- **Thorn of Order** (Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame's Greatsword)

- **Purrfect Execution** (Raora Phantera's Claws)

- **Automaton Assault** (Cecilia Immergreen's Lance)

- **Gremlin Grenade** (Gigi Murin's Gauntlet /can be used in Mace)
  
</details>

### Hats:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Item Required: Carved Pumpkin

- **Amber Coin Hat**
- **Cerulean Cup Hat**
- **Scarlet Wand Hat**
- **Jade Sword Hat**
- **Quest Icon**
- **Chattino Head**
- **Pebble Head**

</details>


### Other Items:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Weapons:
- **Omegatana**
- **Tomato 81800**

Axolotl Buckets:
- **Jess**
- **Grem**
- **Zephyr**
- **doggrem**

Totems:

- **Totem of Grem**
- **Totem of Pebble**
</details>
